svg.text: CCPA · GDPR · CASL · TCPA — deletion requests, consent records, retention schedules
UPDATE pos_customers SET name='DELETED', email=null, phone=null WHERE id=X
-- Cron: DELETE pos_customers WHERE created_at < NOW()-interval '2 years'
Each SMS marketing send requires documented written consent.
Violation: $500–$1,500 per text. System blocks sends to
Signup → confirmation email sent → must click confirm within
10 days. Pending 43 awaiting confirmation before any send.
✓ consent_method stored per record (web-form / POS / import)
✓ consent_text_version links to exact disclosure copy
✓ revoked_at timestamp auto-set on STOP / unsubscribe
↻ Cron enforces deletion nightly at 02:00 UTC
Dram shop liability / state tax law
Retention schedules reviewed quarterly by compliance lead. Last updated: May 1, 2026. Consult legal counsel for jurisdiction-specific obligations.
